html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<style>
  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; width:100%; height:100%; overflow:hidden; background:#fff; }
  .tooltip {
    position: fixed; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.55); color: #fff; font: 11px/1.4 sans-serif;
    padding: 3px 8px; border-radius: 4px; pointer-events: none; z-index: 100; white-space: nowrap;
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg width="100%" height="100%" viewBox="0 0 600 150" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
  <text x="10" y="20" font-size="14" font-family="sans-serif" font-weight="bold">
    Algorithm 10.2: GD+lr-schedule.
  </text>
  <text x="10" y="40" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif">
    <tspan font-weight="bold">Input:</tspan> objective function <tspan style="font-style:italic">J</tspan>, initial parameter vector <tspan style="font-style:italic">θ<sup>0</sup></tspan>, initial learning rate <tspan style="font-style:italic">η<sup>0</sup></tspan>,
  </text>
  <text x="10" y="55" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif">
    learning rate function <tspan style="font-style:italic">lr</tspan>, number of steps <tspan style="font-style:italic">K</tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="10" y="75" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif">
    <tspan font-weight="bold">Output:</tspan> trained parameter vector <tspan style="font-style:italic">θ<sup>*</sup> = θ<sup>K</sup></tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="10" y="95" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif">
    <tspan x="10" dy="1.2em">1 for</tspan> <tspan x="35" dy="0"> <tspan style="font-style:italic">k = 0, …, K−1</tspan> do</tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="35" y="120" font-size="12" font-family="sans-serif" xml:space="preserve">
    <tspan x="35" dy="1.2em">2          <tspan style="font-style:italic">η<sup>k</sup> ← lr(η<sup>0</sup>, k)</tspan></tspan>
    <tspan x="35" dy="1.2em">3          <tspan style="font-style:italic">θ<sup>k+1</sup> ← θ<sup>k</sup> − η<sup>k</sup>∇<sub>θ</sub>J(θ<sup>k</sup>)</tspan></tspan>
  </text>
</svg>

<script>
  try {
    const tt = document.createElement('div');
    tt.setAttribute('class', 'tooltip');
    document.body.appendChild(tt);
    let currentTooltip = null;

    const showPopup = (title, body) => {
      window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title, body }, '*');
    };

    const hidePopup = () => {
      window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title: null }, '*');
    };

    document.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      tt.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + 'px';
      tt.style.top = (e.clientY - 28) + 'px';
      if (currentTooltip) {
        tt.style.display = 'block';
      }
    });

    svg.addEventListener('mouseout', () => {
      tt.style.display = 'none';
      currentTooltip = null;
    });

    svg.addEventListener('click', e => {
      if (e.target.nodeName === 'text') {
        showPopup('Algorithm Step', 'This step explains the gradient descent with learning rate schedule.');
      } else {
        hidePopup();
      }
    });
  } catch (err) {
    console.error(err);
  }
</script>
</body>
</html>
